title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: Kimi K2.6 is a coding-focused LLM released by MoonShot AI, designed for long-running tasks and agent swarm applications. It represents an improvement over the K2.5 model as the base LLM matures toward greater stability and capability.
